headline: $40/month. No contract. No setup fee.
subheadline: One plan. Everything included. Cancel anytime.

plan.name: GoCoding License
highlights: Free demo lesson before you commit

faqs.a: Everything: lessons, materials, assessments, parent reports, the marketing & ops bonuses, and ongoing updates. No setup fee, no royalty, no hidden costs.

faqs.q: Do I need to buy equipment?
faqs.a: For coding programs (Scratch, Python): only a laptop or tablet per student. For Robotics: a starter kit per 2 students (LEGO Spike, WeDo, or comparable). We'll help you choose.

faqs.q: Can my teacher really teach this without a CS degree?
faqs.a: Yes. Every lesson is scripted minute-by-minute, and prep takes ~10 minutes. Our partner centers run the curriculum with elementary teachers, college students, and parents.

faqs.q: What if I want multiple curricula?
faqs.a: Each curriculum is $40/month. Most centers start with one (often Scratch) and add others as they grow.
No. Month-to-month. Cancel anytime. No penalties or fine print.
Two weeks is typical. One week for teacher onboarding (we provide the materials), one for marketing your first group.
Yes — we'll send you one full demo lesson for free, before any payment. Have your teacher run it. If it doesn't work, you owe nothing.

faqs.q: What ages do the programs cover?
faqs.a: 4–13. Scratch Jr starts at age 4. Python goes up to 13. Robotics runs 4–8 (Jr) and 6–13 (advanced).
